zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Barnewall於1415年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯可利可斯托時，她的父親Christopher Barnewall25歲，母親Matilda Drake28歲。她於大約1435年與William Darcy II在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯可利可斯托結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1501年在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯紐可亞斯特爾享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Barnewall于1415年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯可利可斯托时，她的父亲Christopher Barnewall25岁，母亲Matilda Drake28岁。她于大约1435年与William Darcy II在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯可利可斯托结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1501年在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯紐可亞斯特爾享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: Barnewall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Barnwell
meanings: English (Warwickshire): habitational name from a place so called in Cambridgeshire and another in Northamptonshire, both named with Old English beorn ‘warrior’ (genitive plural beorna) or the Old English personal name Beorna + well(a) ‘stream’.

Irish (Dublin, Meath): of English origin (the same as 1 above). Sir Michael de Berneval or de Barneval took part in Strongbow's expedition to Ireland in 1172. He first held land in Berehavan, Cork, before the main landing in Leinster. The English surname was Gaelicized as de Bearnabhal.
History: A John Barnwell (c. 1671–1724) emigrated to SC from Ireland at the end of the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Barnewall was born in 1415, in Crickstown, County Meath, Ireland, her father, Christopher Barnewall, was 25 and her mother, Matilda Drake, was 28. She married William Darcy II about 1435, in Crickstown, County Meath, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1501, in Newcastle, County Meath, Ireland, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Barnewall est née en 1415, à Crickstown, County Meath, Irlande, son père, Christopher Barnewall, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Matilda Drake, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé William Darcy II environ 1435, à Crickstown, County Meath, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1501, à Newcastle, County Meath, Irlande, à l’âge de 86 ans.

Sie hat um 1435 in Crickstown, County Meath, Irland William Darcy II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1501 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Newcastle, County Meath, Irland.

Lei sposato William Darcy II circa 1435, nel Crickstown, County Meath, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1501, nel Newcastle, County Meath, Irlanda, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Barnewallが1415年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスクリクストウンで生まれた時，父Christopher Barnewallは25歳，母Matilda Drakeは28歳であった。約1435年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスクリクストウンでWilliam Darcy IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1501年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスニューカストルで86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Barnewall(이)가 1415년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 크릭스타운에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Christopher Barnewall(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda Drake(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1435년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 크릭스타운에서 William Darcy II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1501년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 뉴카스틀에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com William Darcy II aproximadamente 1435, em Crickstown, County Meath, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1501, em Newcastle, County Meath, Irlanda, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Barnewall родилась в 1415 г. в местности криккстоун, коунти мит, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Christopher Barnewall было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda Drake, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Darcy II около 1435 г. в местности криккстоун, коунти мит, Ирландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1501 г. в местности нюкастл, коунти мит, Ирландия в возрасте 86 лет.
